text: Weasley, give me that disgusting rat! No, it's scabbers! I don't care, it's elusive. This filthy animal doesn't belong near me. In the tea pot, done. Nobody does it better. Ron Weasley, are you actually kidding me? You have the rat again! Give me that rat! There. The nice dog can have it now. That's not a dog, it's the grim. That's a beautiful dog, the best dog. Now go eat that rat, you beautiful dog. Oh shit, get away from me! The grim is actually Commissioner Gordon. Ron, that's ridiculous. Commissioner Gordon wait no Trump has me all mixed up. I mean serious black serious black. Are you sure? Of course I'm sure. It's finally time. I'm here! Did I miss anything? Wait, is that Commissioner Gordon? You're an ugly freak. You look like the penguin. Gordon you have to do something about this penguin. Double door! Can we use the time turn and now? There are some things we need to change. The time turn and what are you proposed to change? The best place to start is where we have already been. Wrong! We're starting now. Harry, this is the time-turner. Time-travel? Nobody knows more about time than me. I'll take that. What? You can't just watch me! I'll see you in part four!
